description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and defines a single build stage. Add a build job named build that runs in the build stage, executes `apk add --no-cache bash cmake make g++ linux-headers git openssl-dev libcurl` followed by `sh build.sh`, and stores the files piebot/piebot and piebot/config.txt as artifacts. No caches, services, variables, or conditional rules are required.
